title: Hiring foreign crew to work on a fishing vessel :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Hiring foreign crew to work on a fishing vessel
Learn about the rules you must follow when you hire foreign crew to work on a fishing vessel. There are specific employment conditions you must give, and you must explain what a crew member's rights and obligations are.
- Fishing crew employment conditions If you are hiring foreign crew to work on a fishing vessel, you must provide employment that meets certain conditions.

## Fishing crew employment conditions
If you are hiring foreign crew to work on a fishing vessel, you must provide employment that meets certain conditions.
- What to include in crew employment agreements When you employ crew to work on fishing vessels in New Zealand waters, you must include standard principles in their employment agreements.

## What to include in crew employment agreements
When you employ crew to work on fishing vessels in New Zealand waters, you must include standard principles in their employment agreements.
- Fishing crew rights and obligations If you recruit overseas workers to work as crew on fishing vessels in New Zealand waters, you have certain responsibilities and obligations you must meet.

## Fishing crew rights and obligations
If you recruit overseas workers to work as crew on fishing vessels in New Zealand waters, you have certain responsibilities and obligations you must meet.
- Crew rights and obligations guides Before a crew member's first voyage to New Zealand you must explain their rights and obligations under New Zealand immigration and employment law.

## Crew rights and obligations guides
Before a crew member's first voyage to New Zealand you must explain their rights and obligations under New Zealand immigration and employment law.
